summary: Coordinator custody record of the independent GPT-5.6 (xhigh) Gate-A statistical-integrity audit of the nsk1 B′ Stage-0 PASS fork recommendation (`docs/next/analysis/nsk1-bprime-interpretation.md`, Fable designer-11).
